name: Steak Au Poivre
recipeInstructions:
1. Coarsely crush the peppercorns.
2. Sprinkle both sides of the steak with crushed peppercorns, pressing in firmly with fingers.
3. Let the steak stand at room temperature for 30 minutes.
4. Preheat a 6 1/2-inch microwave browning dish on 100% power for 3 minutes.
5. Add the cooking oil to the browning dish and swirl to coat the dish.
6. Place the steak in the browning dish.
7. Micro-cook, covered, on 100% power for 1 minute.
8. Turn the steak and micro-cook, covered, on 100% power about 30 seconds more or until done. Remove the steak to a warm plate.
9. Stir brandy and bouillon granules into liquid in the browning dish.
10. Micro-cook, uncovered, on 100% power for 20 to 30 seconds or till boiling.
11. Pour over the steak and serve.
